tasks.subject: Task 1: "Usar mi ubicacion" origin button on Home page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a GPS-based origin option to the route-generation form, reusing the existing "guardado" coords format so the backend needs zero changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (`PAGE_HOME`, origin select area and its `<script>` block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Button next to the origin select calls `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition()`
- [ ] On success, a new option `guardado|<lat>|<lng>|Mi ubicacion (GPS)` is added and selected, triggering `onOrigenSelectChange()`
- [ ] On failure/unsupported browser, shows an inline error message, doesn't break the rest of the form
- [ ] `pytest -q` still 133 passed (no backend logic touched)

**Verify:** Manual browser check with mocked geolocation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser check with mocked geolocation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["button calls geolocation API", "success adds and selects new guardado-format option", "failure shows inline error", "tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: "Cerca de mi" nearest-lead lookup on Mapa page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a button that finds the nearest geocoded lead (across all categories) to the phone's GPS position, centers the map on it, and opens its detail panel with the distance shown.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (`PAGE_MAPA`, cat-tabs area and its `<script>` block, `renderPanel()`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] New button calls `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition()`
- [ ] JS haversine function computes distance to every lead in `allLeads` (ignoring active category tab), finds the minimum
- [ ] Map centers on the closest lead (`map.setView`), detail panel opens via `renderPanel()` with a new distance row
- [ ] Empty `allLeads` or geolocation failure shows an inline error message, doesn't break the rest of the page
- [ ] `pytest -q` still 133 passed (no backend logic touched)

**Verify:** Manual browser check with mocked geolocation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser check with mocked geolocation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["button calls geolocation API", "haversine finds correct nearest lead across all categories", "map centers and panel opens with distance", "errors handled inline", "tests still pass"]}
```
